author: w3Lb
content: WHY: rg generates bash/zsh/fish/powershell completions + a man page at build time; ripsed has neither (no clap_complete in the workspace). SCOPE: add clap_complete + clap_mangen as xtask deps (NOT runtime deps of ripsed-cli); xtask gen-completions writes all four shells + man page to a dist/ dir from the existing Cli derive (needs Cli to expose its Command — add a doc-hidden fn or move the derive struct to a shared location xtask can reach; simplest: ripsed-cli exposes pub fn command() behind a feature gate or xtask depends on ripsed-cli as a lib). Release workflow: run the generator and include completions/ + ripsed.1 in each artifact tarball (rg ships them this way). Also wire a CI check that generation succeeds so the derive never drifts. TESTS: xtask invocation smoke test; artifact packaging step lists the files.
